title: A Cosmic Vibration
lines: You lean in closer. The hum isn't just a sound; it's a vibration that resonates in your skull, synchronized with the pulsing violet light.
It sounds like a thousand voices chanting in a language of pure mathematics, a low, tectonic drone that speaks of collapsing stars and the birth of void-gods.
The longer you listen, the more the attic around you feels like a thin, crumbling facade.

options.desc: Shake off the vibration and focus
